hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'Skybyn_APP/lib/'; then PID=$(pgrep -f 'flutter_tools.snapshot' | head -1); [ -n "$PID" ] && kill -SIGUSR1 "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); OUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_response.stdout // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'flutter build apk' && echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'Built build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk'; then cp /Users/bismo/development/Skybyn_APP/build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk /Volumes/FD-Drive/htdocs/skybyn/app/android/skybyn.apk 2>/dev/null || true; fi
